title: Quality History Entry
description: Schema for quality_history.jsonl entries. Each line represents one quality assessment of a paper section by the peer-reviewer agent. Used by the quality ratchet to track per-section scores over time and detect regressions.

aggregate_score.description: Average of quality, clarity, originality, and significance scores (1-10 scale). Used for ratchet comparison.

scores.description: Per-dimension scores aligned with quality_scores.schema.json (NeurIPS rubric). For ICML venues, scores are normalized to 1-10 scale before storage.

previous_best.description: The section's previous high-water mark aggregate score. Null for the first review of a section.

action.description: Whether this draft was kept (score >= previous best) or discarded (regression detected)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this assessment was recorded

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the draft being scored
